- [ ] Frontend-only development (`frontend-dev`)

## Guardrail checklist

- [ ] I validated API contract compatibility (if backend/frontend interface changed).
- [ ] Backend tests pass locally (for backend-affecting changes).
- [ ] Frontend build passes locally (for frontend-affecting changes).
- [ ] This PR is scoped and does not mix unrelated work.
